core_mechanism: pointwise bounding of a solution to a constrained nonlinear diffusion/elliptic operator by convolving its driving source measure with a scale-invariant power-law (Riesz) kernel — a potential-theoretic estimate that translates the distribution of source data into local (gradient) behaviour of the solution
brief_reason: The abstract establishes pointwise gradient estimates for solutions of a nonlinear elliptic (obstacle-constrained) problem with measure data expressed in terms of Riesz potentials of that data, i.e. bounding the solution locally via a power-law-kernel convolution of the source.
